title: Covid Vaccine Maker BioNTech Offers Cheap Biotech Play Given Huge Cash Reserves
summary: The company’s cash and securities nearly equal its market value, meaning investors aren’t paying much for the Covid franchise and a pipeline focused on cancer treatments.

title: GSK's RSV Vaccine Arexvy Wins FDA Nod for High-Risk Younger Adults
summary: GSK secures FDA approval to expand Arexvy's use to high-risk adults aged 18-49 years, broadening access as the company pushes wider global adoption.

title: Pfizer Trials Highlight Effort To Broaden Future Revenue And Defend Franchises
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) has started a Phase 1 trial of a new tafamidis tablet formulation aimed at improving manufacturing flexibility and cost-efficiency. The company has initiated a Phase 2 pediatric trial of etrasimod in ulcerative colitis and a Phase 1 trial for a next generation oncology candidate. Pfizer has completed a Phase 2 study of its multivalent pneumococcal vaccine candidate PG4, with data analysis underway. These updates provide a fresh look at how Pfizer, best known recently for...

title: Man's dog was riddled with tumors and dying. He used ChatGPT to design a custom cancer vaccine, stunning researchers
summary: With no biology degree and just $3,000, he designed a personalized mRNA vaccine in a world first. Moderna and Merck are spending billions to bring the same technology to human patients.

title: Ecuador trade deal: Trump administration targets lower food and tech levies
summary: Investing.com — U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer signed a finalized trade agreement with Ecuador on Friday, reducing tariffs across several industrial and agricultural sectors as the Trump administration continues to overhaul its Western Hemisphere trade strategy. The deal, signed alongside Ecuadorian Minister Luis Alberto Jaramillo, opens access to a market of 18 million consumers for U.S. exporters of machinery, IT, and chemicals.
